transcript: Zidane! Liftoff for France! Zidane! Zidane! Liftoff for France! It's a good tee! And he brushed the outside of the net rather than the inside. Now Divac! Here's an opportunity! And Marcel Desailly is already on his way before a sight of rain. Hesitated, Duggari could finish it. Well, just as there was hesitation from Tapperel, so there was... After years of waiting and wondering, now tears of pure joy belongs to France, and it does so for the very first time. Penalty. Yes. Just. The bounce off the underside of the bar. Crabbed the right side of the line. Deep from Pirlo for Matarazzi. A moment of near instant redemption. Pirlo's delivery. Oh, it's off the bar. Almost a carbon copy. This time for Luca Toni. This is in the Euro 2000 final. These two finish 90 minutes locked together and 1-1. Time to measure the delivery for Zidane. What a save. Just as it looked as though he was about to provide his career with the perfect ending. The Italians have a man down by their own penalty area. Oh my word. That is extraordinary. It's penalties to decide the winners of the 2006 World Cup. The spot for Italy. Down the middle, Pirlo. One out of one for the Azzurri. But never like this. He's done it now, emphatically. 1-1. He's up to it. Goodness is he up to it. That one didn't cross the line. Not like Zidane's early in the game. That stayed out. Scores. No keepers keeping that one out. The defenders are doing it just right. Long run, good penalty but it's helpless. Italy are so so close now. Italy win, Sanyo scores, he went for the blast, France are still alive but only just. He's thinking about the job he has to do and that's all. And Grosso has done that job. Goal! Goal! That's a terrible back-hitter into the part of Higuain who should have opened the scoring. Kroos with the take. Against the world. Flicked in by Griezmann, and it's on! Running it for Silco, it's Mbappé! Oh, my God! Teenage kicks! The ultimate teenage kick! The boy with the wall that he speaks! Kylian Mbappe! The race was commanded by Mandjoukic! And Croatia have a little sniff. It is France. Allez, les Bleus. All rise. The Deschamps double is complete. Diva Rear Di Maria, lovely swivel of the hips, and down goes Di Maria, penalty Argentina, and Messi scores. Messi turns it out to Alvarez who gets it through and that's McAllister looking at Di Maria Argentina well on top in the World Cup final we'll talk about a team goal logging it on it around the round the corner, from McAllister and Messi. Montemendi had the head start but he's been beaten now by Thuram and Thuram's down and that's going to be a penalty. To get the game back on. He's done it. And France are now in one big hurry. Mbappé gets the return! Oh Clermont! In a flash! In a heartbeat! Messi finds McAllister, and Messi now finds Martinez, what a block, the follow up from Montiel, and another one, it's time for Ran in the way, and looks to find Lautaro, Martinez, Martinez puts it wide, There's Messi Messi wants it again Lloris in the way Was it off the line or over the line the referee's had a look at the watch and the referee has pointed to the middle and said go Messi is in the middle of that pack he might have just won the World Cup there's Mbappe it was charged charged at. And the referee says. Mbappe is the man. A hat-trick in the biggest game of all. With one more punt forward. Call number one. He's in, Martinez with the save, for France, and Mbappé will score for France, and he rolls it in, saved by Martinez, and Dybala does it Wide It's Argentina Kings of football For the third time And the tears will fall Thanks for watching Football Show The home of quality football videos subscribe now
